PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY, $818.00 U.S. CURRENCY, $200.00 U.S. CURRENCY, $90,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION DECLARATION OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE (MEGUEL PONCE) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,000.00; $818.00; $200.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CAROLYN HAGIN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS JON RAHOI AND MIGUEL PONCE. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $90,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
